hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-extrabold tracking-tighter leading-tight
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-snug

components.buttons: Flat colors, sharp or subtle rounded edges (rounded-md), text-sm font-semibold, hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-transform
components.cards: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg overflow-hidden. Use 'border-collapse' grid styles for dense data tables.
components.inputs: bg-white border border-slate-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-950 focus:border-slate-950 transition-all text-sm
components.badges: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold border
components.tables: w-full text-sm text-left. Headers text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider. Rows border-b border-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-50
components.knowledge_graph: Cytoscape container with bg-slate-50, border border-slate-200, rounded-lg. Nodes: slate-900 (Person), blue-600 (Company), rose-500 (Risk).
components.gauges: Half-doughnut charts via Recharts for Trust Score (0-100), color-coded by risk level.

instructions_to_main_agent.setup: Install lucide-react, recharts, react-cytoscapejs, cytoscape, tailwind-merge, clsx, framer-motion, react-hook-form, zod. Import Manrope and IBM Plex Sans from Google Fonts.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout: Implement a public Landing Page layout and an Authenticated Dashboard layout with a left sidebar navigation.
instructions_to_main_agent.components_to_build: Hero section, Features Grid, Dashboard Overview (Stats, Charts), Background Check Wizard (multi-step form), Results Page with Trust Score Gauge, Cytoscape Knowledge Graph component, and Data Tables.
instructions_to_main_agent.styling_rules: Strict adherence to the 1px border rule. Avoid heavy shadows. Ensure high contrast for data readability. No generic Sans for headings (Use Manrope). MUST include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements.
